blog_title: DTF vs Screen Print on 240 GSM Oversized T-Shirt — Live Comparison for Indian Bulk Printers
caption:
DTF looks glossy and sharp. Screen print feels like the fabric itself. Same design, same 240 GSM royal blue—totally different results 😬

We tested both on oversized blanks. DTF stayed perfect after 10 washes. Screen print faded. Thinner fabric? Ink bleeds. Thicker fabric? Both work clean.

Which one's right for your next 500-piece bulk order? Save this post and check the full comparison.
